name: agent-secrets-plumbing
description: Safe AI-agent workflows for secrets plumbing, policy review, redaction, and non-leaking verification.

interface.shortDescription: Safe secrets workflows for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Design, review, and verify secrets plumbing without exposing secret values. Covers OpenBao/Vault KV v2, GitHub OIDC, SOPS/age, 1Password, Kubernetes ESO/CSI, runtime injection, redaction, and non-leaking verification.
defaultPrompt: Review this repository for non-leaking secrets plumbing and produce a safe injection plan.
